creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Chris,

I think we should proceed with updating devel/clanlib to 2.3.6, but we need to 
keep a legacy version for games/openalchemist and games/trophy (maintainers 
CC'd).  I propose to repocopy devel/clanlib to devel/clanlib1 and update 
devel/clanlib1 to 1.0.0.  I'll add an UPDATING entry so users know to switch 
to the legacy version if needed.

If you have an update for games/super_methane_brothers, I would like to apply 
it with the clanlib update...otherwise it work with clanlib1 for the time 
being.

I do have a few issues with your patch that I have fixed, but I would like 
your approval/feedback.

1. PORTEPOCH must be kept
2. The LICENSE is the ZLIB license and variables for the license must be 
adjusted.  We don't need a copy of the license in files either.
3. There were some unneeded dependencies...SDL, xmu, xi
4. USE_FONTCONFIG doesn't do anything
5. External libtool was causing problems...the included libtool works just 
fine
6. Removed some unused REINPLACE_CMDs
7. Builds fine on 7.x and 8.x with my changes, so remove BROKEN
8. I'd rather not set ONLY_FOR_ARCHS until it is proven that it doesn't build 
on other archs.
9. I'd like to see the version numbers dynamically added to the pkg-plist so 
that the entire pkg-plist doesn't have to be adjusted on major updates.
10. lib, libdata, libdata/pkgconfig are in mtree so the port should not 
attempt to remove them
11. I've renamed the patches so they are consistent with what "make makepatch" 
creates

I've attached a new diff, but it might be easier to view things on Redports:
https://redports.org/browser/bsdkaffee/devel/clanlib
https://redports.org/browser/bsdkaffee/devel/clanlib1
https://redports.org/browser/bsdkaffee/games/openalchemist
https://redports.org/browser/bsdkaffee/games/super_methane_brothers
https://redports.org/browser/bsdkaffee/games/trophy

- Jason
